errors.meaning: The Paperclip watchdog agent timed out after 120s — it did not finish checking for blocked/orphan tasks. Consecutive errors: 1.
errors.suggestedFix: Increase the job timeoutSeconds beyond 120 or reduce the number of API calls the agent makes per run to avoid hitting the limit.

errors.meaning: The daily brief content was generated successfully but delivery to the Slack channel failed on the last 3 consecutive runs (consecutiveErrors: 3). The brief is being produced but not posted.
errors.suggestedFix: Verify the delivery target channel ID C0AMSE2TW2X is correct and the Slack bot has access. Check if the channel:C0AMSE2TW2X format is valid for this job's delivery config.
